name: cyber-audit
description: Read-only exposure audit of the user's Mac (and ~/Documents/code projects) for a CVE, breach, malicious package, or other security advisory, then write a structured report to ~/Documents/security-audits/. Use when the user shares a breach/CVE/malware/supply-chain advisory and asks if they're affected, says "scan my system for X", "are we affected by Y", "check if I'm vulnerable to Z", or requests any hack/breach/cyber/vulnerability audit on this Mac. Output matches the existing audit format in ~/Documents/security-audits/.
